title: About Codebasics AI Pro
transcript: Something interesting happened in our company recently. [music] In my team, which is team CodeBasics, there are people from marketing, operation, content, etc. [music] They built 35 plus applications using AI, and 16 of them are already in production, [music] which means they're being used internally by team, and this has replaced some of the paid tools that we were using previously. The interesting part is many of these apps are built by non-technical folks who do not have any code background, but who knows how to use AI tools, [music] and who have a structured way of thinking. And this experience made us realize something important. If our team can do it, then lakhs of working professionals can do it as well if they have a right system. So, today I want to talk about something new that we have launched. It is called CodeBasics AI Pro, [music] and it is very different from anything we have done before. Let me real. Every week there is something new happening in the world of AI. New tool is being released. There is some new headline. And if you're a working professional, let's say you are in HR, marketing, operation, [music] finance, you are probably going through one of these feelings. Number one, [music] you want to learn AI to augment your career or whatever work you're doing, you want to speed it up using AI, but you're not sure what should be the right approach of learning. When you go to internet, YouTube, [music] you find tons of tutorials, you get confused, and you are not able to decide, okay, what thing I should learn first, and how do I learn [music] things in a systematic way so that you can get the maximum career benefit. Number two, you hear all these news and tool releases, etc., >> [music] >> but you are not sure if it is a marketing hype or if there is real value in it. Number three, your colleague automated some workflow using AI, but you are still doing the same thing manually because you think it is too technical. Number four, you are not able to move beyond your typical Q&A usage with ChatGPT and Claude and build something real using AI that [music] can transform your life. So, people are confused, and it is not your fault. Most of the working professionals are feeling it this way right now because most of the content is [music] built for data scientists, AI engineers, and not for you. And that is exactly why we built CodeBasics AI Pro. Let me now give you overview of this program. This is not a course. It is not a boot camp. It is a monthly membership program, and you get five things in this program. The first one is [clears throat] you will get your AI Pro Starter Kit, which is bunch of recorded videos where you will clear your fundamentals. What is LLM? What is uh context window, prompt, etc., so that you can make sense out of conversations which are happening around AI. Then, the second thing is live session every 2 week. So, every 2 week there will be 1 and 1/2 to 2 hour live session on a weekend where we will take a real problem. So, let's say you are working in finance, and you want to automate your invoices. We will take that use case, solve it in this live session so that you can watch it, and you can apply it in your workplace. We'll take different use cases, one in HR, then in marketing, finance, so that it covers all kind of different professions. If you cannot watch live session due to whatever reason, you can always see the recorded session, okay? The second one is this weekly AI hype versus reality digest that you will get over an email. It is only a few minutes read where we would cover what is actually hype and what is reality, okay? We will do our own analysis on it, and we'll share so that you are up to date with the most relevant information that can impact you. It's not like you're reading some random news on internet or watching a random YouTube video with some marketing gimmick in it. Next one is monthly hands-on challenge where we'll take, once again, a real-life business use case. We will design a challenge around it. People will participate. They will submit their solutions. There will be discussions, and you will learn a lot by participating it and also by watching other people's submissions. And all of this will happen through a private community. So, we will use a Discord server as a private community where you can interact with like-minded people. So, all the people who are part of this membership will be present in this Discord. They'll be sharing their ideas. They'll be posting submissions for their challenges. You can watch their submission. You can learn a lot from them. You can communicate with them, network, and that way you are part of this very progressive community which is learning AI, which is keeping themselves up to date with whatever is happening in the AI landscape, okay? So, these four plus the pre-recorded sessions, you know, are the five features that you will get as part of this membership. Once you become a member, your first 2 weeks journey is going to look something like this. In week one, you will understand AI, which means on day one, you will know what is LLM, tokens, prompts, context window, so on. On day two, you will learn about AI tools. We have given all the description, by the way, you can check the website. On day three, you will write a prompt that actually works. Day four, you'll set up and configure your AI tools that matter for your work, okay? And day seven, you have the foundation ready, okay? In week two, you will take this foundation to your work. So, you'll pick one task from your actual job this week. Use AI to do it. It up summary, analysis, comparison, small workflow, whatever it is. And day nine, you will get your first digest, basically your Friday digest, okay? Then, you will also get the first challenge, okay? On day 11. So, every month a new challenge will land. A specific workplace scenario that pushes you to use what you have actually learned. Day 13, your first live session, okay? And day 14 is 2 weeks you are in, uh you have a working toolkit, a prompting framework, a digest every Friday. You have already attempted one challenge, have watched a live session, and you are a part of the thriving community where you can interact and you can learn. Now, this 2 weeks doesn't mean your course is completed. 2 weeks is to prepare you for your ongoing journey, okay? It is a membership that has just started. From there on, every week you'll have digest, every 2 week you'll have live session. You will have challenges. It will keep on going as long as AI is growing and evolving, you will continue learning new things and applying those things for your career benefit. Now, let me be clear who this is for and who this is not for. This is not for people who want to become AI engineer or data scientist where you develop deep [music] technical skills along with coding to build custom AI solution. This is not for those people. This is for people who are working professionals, say HR, finance, marketing, [music] sales, management. You know, you are in any of those roles, and you don't know where to start, where you can learn AI [music] to boost your career. This is for those people. You will need 1 hour every week for this program. This is not like spend 20 hours, 30 hours watching videos, okay? This is very interactive program. You need only 1 hour commitment every week. Also, you do not require any technical background. Also, you don't need to know coding. All you need is enthusiasm to learn AI. Even students can learn this, >> [music] >> and if you're a working professional, you will find it most useful. You will find having Claude code subscription to be beneficial, although it's not mandatory mandatory, but if you have the subscription, it is going to benefit you. Now, you might ask, why should I trust these guys? Fair question. Do your research. We have a YouTube channel with 1 and 1/2 million subscribers. You can check our videos, our teaching style. Our platform codebasics.io has more than 679,000 registered [music] learners, 6,000 plus reviews. Every single review on our website is 100% genuine and authentic. We don't make things up. We don't post fake reviews, so you can read all of that. >> [music] >> But more than all these numbers, we practice what we teach. So, remember those 35 plus tools that I mentioned earlier? We built those in our company, CodeBasics. [music] We automated various things, and that's real experience that we are going to share with all of you. The live sessions are led by Ham Anand. He's going to be the main instructor who has 10 plus years of international experience, >> [music] >> and he's a practitioner of these AI tools. He uses them day in and day out. Let's talk about pricing now. The price is going to be 600 [music] rupees per month in India. In countries like US, $10 a month. Now, we have something called an inner circle program, and if you are part of inner circle, you get it at half price, basically 300 rupees a month. And the way this program works is the initial set of people who will join through inner circle program will be providing us a feedback. It's a quick 5-minute survey that you will participate in once a quarter, where you provide a feedback of our program to us, and you help us shape the product, okay? So, this is not some kind of discount. It's a partnership that will help us shape this product. You can pay via [music] UPI, credit card, monthly, or annually. If you are subscribing to annual plan, of course, you will be paying less price as opposed to monthly plan. If you are a monthly member, you can cancel anytime. If you are paying annually, and let's say uh you have paid full 12 months fee, and after 3 months, you realize that you want to cancel it, no worries. We will give you refund of the remaining 9 months. There is no convenience fee, no early exit penalty fee, nothing. It's a very transparent pricing, where whenever you cancel any whatever term you have left in your 12-month program, you will get a refund of that. We call this a Code Basics Promise. We would rather keep your trust than trap your money. All right, that's all I had. Please check the link of this uh program landing page uh in the video description below. [music] If you have any question, post in the comment box below. Thank you.
